examples.title: Basic tooltip
examples.description: Hover or focus the trigger to show the tooltip text.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Button } from 'cinder/button';
  import { Tooltip } from 'cinder/tooltip';
</script>

<Tooltip text="This is a helpful explanation.">
  <Button variant="secondary">Hover me</Button>
</Tooltip>

examples.title: Tooltip placements
examples.description: Top, right, bottom, and left placement options.
